candidates.question: Do these Regulations include their annexes and may they be cited as the Common Reporting Standard Regulations 2018?
candidates.notes: Covers the title and citation rule.

candidates.question: Does the reporting requirement include identifying the currency in which each amount is denominated?
May a Reporting Financial Institution use a service provider to fulfill the reporting and due diligence obligations?
May the due diligence procedures for New Accounts be applied to all Pre-existing Accounts?
Is an account with a negative balance deemed to have a balance or value equal to nil?
Must a Group Cash Value Insurance Contract cover 25 or more employees or certificate holders to qualify for the temporary non-reportable treatment?
Must a Broad Participation Retirement Fund be subject to government regulation and provide information reporting to tax authorities?
Does a Reportable Jurisdiction Person include an estate of a decedent that was resident in a Reportable Jurisdiction?
Must the term Controlling Persons be interpreted consistently with the Financial Action Task Force Recommendations?
Is a trust that is a Passive NFE excluded from being treated as a similar legal arrangement for the Passive NFE rule?
Does the document define any reporting rule for cryptocurrency wallets?
candidates.notes: Negative candidate; no wallet-specific rule appears in the document.

candidates.question: What percentage of gross income makes a Custodial Institution's holding of Financial Assets count as a substantial portion of its business?
How many employees or certificate holders must a group contract cover?
What is the single-beneficiary asset-right limit for a Broad Participation Retirement Fund?
How many participants must a Narrow Participation Retirement Fund have fewer than?
Within how many days must overpayments above USD50,000 be refunded under the qualified credit card issuer rule?
What percentage of gross income is used for the Investment Entity test in subparagraph A(6)(b)?
What is the maximum aggregate amount payable to any employee, certificate holder, or beneficiary under the group contract rule?
candidates.notes: USD cap in the group contract safe harbor.

candidates.question: What percentage of a Narrow Participation Retirement Fund's assets may be held by nonresident participants?
After how many months does the new-business exception for an NFE stop applying?
How many cryptocurrency reporting categories does the document specify?
candidates.notes: Negative candidate; no cryptocurrency categories are specified.

candidates.question: What body makes these Regulations?
candidates.expected_answer: Board of Directors of the DIFCA

candidates.question: Which organization’s explanatory material is integral to the Common Reporting Standard for these Regulations?
candidates.expected_answer: OECD

candidates.question: What is the term for an account maintained by a Financial Institution that includes Depository Accounts and Custodial Accounts?
candidates.expected_answer: Financial Account

candidates.question: What is the term for an account that holds one or more Financial Assets for the benefit of another person?
candidates.expected_answer: Custodial Account

candidates.question: What is the term for a contract under which the issuer agrees to make payments for a period determined by life expectancy?
candidates.expected_answer: Annuity Contract

candidates.question: What is the term for an insurance company that issues or is obligated to make payments with respect to Cash Value Insurance Contracts or Annuity Contracts?
candidates.expected_answer: Specified Insurance Company

candidates.question: What is the term for a fund established to provide retirement, disability, or death benefits to fewer than 50 participants?
candidates.expected_answer: Narrow Participation Retirement Fund

candidates.question: What is the term for a Financial Account maintained by a Reporting Financial Institution as of 31 December 2016?
candidates.expected_answer: Pre-existing Account

candidates.question: Which four categories are included in the term Financial Institution?
Which two parties can a Reporting Financial Institution rely on for self-certification under Section IX B?
Which three entities are listed in the first Non-Reporting Financial Institution category?
Which natural persons are included in the trust definition of Controlling Persons?
expected_answer: any other natural person(s) exercising ultimate effective control over the trust

candidates.question: What is the in-force date shown on the cover page?
On what date does a New Account mean an account opened on or after?
As of what date is a Pre-existing Account defined?
By what date must a Qualified Credit Card Issuer implement the policy or refund rule?
What information must each Reporting Financial Institution report for every Reportable Account?
candidates.expected_answer: The account holder's identifying details, account number, reporting FI name/number, year-end balance or closure, and the relevant income or proceeds amounts, with currency identified.

candidates.question: When is an account treated as a Reportable Account?
candidates.expected_answer: Beginning on the date it is identified as reportable under Sections II through VII, and it is then reported annually in the following calendar year.

candidates.question: What must a Reporting Financial Institution establish, maintain, and document under Section II?
candidates.expected_answer: The due diligence procedures in Sections II through VII that are designed to identify Reportable Accounts.

candidates.question: When may the residence address test be used for a pre-existing individual account?
candidates.expected_answer: When the institution has a current residence address in its records based on Documentary Evidence; then it may treat the holder as resident in that jurisdiction.

candidates.question: What does the electronic record search look for in lower value pre-existing individual accounts?
candidates.expected_answer: Indicia such as a Reportable Jurisdiction address, telephone number, standing instructions, power of attorney, or a care-of/in-hold mail address.

candidates.question: What must a new individual account self-certification do?
candidates.expected_answer: It must establish the account holder's tax residence(s) and confirm the certification's reasonableness based on the account opening information.

candidates.question: What does Account Holder mean?
candidates.expected_answer: The person listed or identified as the holder of the Financial Account; for cash value insurance or annuity contracts, the person entitled to access cash value or change the beneficiary, or otherwise the owner/persons with vested entitlement.

candidates.question: What does Documentary Evidence include?
candidates.expected_answer: A certificate of residence, valid ID for an individual, official documentation for an entity, or audited financial statements, third-party credit reports, bankruptcy filings, or securities regulator reports.

candidates.question: What does Reportable Jurisdiction Person mean?
candidates.expected_answer: An individual, entity, or decedent's estate resident in a Reportable Jurisdiction; entities with no tax residence are treated as resident where effective management is situated.

candidates.question: What does Controlling Persons mean for a trust?
candidates.expected_answer: The settlor(s), trustee(s), protector(s) if any, beneficiaries or classes of beneficiaries, and any other natural person(s) exercising ultimate effective control.

candidates.question: What does Financial Asset mean?
candidates.expected_answer: It includes securities, partnership interests, commodities, swaps, insurance contracts, annuity contracts, and related interests, but excludes a non-debt direct interest in real property.

candidates.question: What is the account-maintained rule for a Depository Account?
candidates.expected_answer: It is maintained by the Financial Institution obligated to make payments on the account, not by an agent.

candidates.question: What does the document say about cryptocurrency wallet reporting?
candidates.expected_answer: There is no information on this question in the provided documents.
